LAW AND MOTION 302, MR. LIWAG PRESENTED THE COURT WITH A COPY OF HIS FILED OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION, BUT HE DID NOT COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 8.3(D). THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANT. MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) NA'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Henry Liwag (714.745.2400) cross complainant and responding party appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Liwag presented the Court with a copy of his filed opposition to the motion, but he did not comply with Local Rule 8.3(D). The Court modified its ruling as follows: Grant. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
